description: You are a 5th-grade science teacher at an OLPC school. Your students have just completed a week-long outdoor temperature measurement experiment. Create a science lab report in the Sugar Write activity that includes a data table with 5 rows and 2 columns ('Day' and 'Temperature (°C)') containing measurements for Day 1 (22°C), Day 2 (24°C), Day 3 (21°C), Day 4 (26°C), and Day 5 (23°C). The report must also feature an 'Analysis' section discussing data patterns, such as temperature variation and range, and a 'Conclusion' section summarizing the findings. Save the completed document to /home/ga/Documents/temperature_report.odt.
